course.title: Premed
course.subtitle: A rigorous, pathway-aware foundation for medical study
course.description: An evidence-backed knowledge graph spanning the portable science core, medicine-facing bridges, route-specific preparation, scientific inquiry, laboratory practice, and integration.
course.disclaimer: Educational preparation only. It is not a degree, admission guarantee, medical qualification, or medical advice.

linkTypes.contains: Parent hierarchy: domain to module, or module to topic.
linkTypes.prerequisite: Source should be learned before target; these links form a directed acyclic graph.
linkTypes.cross-link: A symmetric conceptual connection; it does not impose study order.

requirementLegend.portable-core: Part of the adjudicated, cross-system academic spine.
requirementLegend.medicine-bridge: Medicine-facing content whose entrant status varies by system.
requirementLegend.pathway: Required only for a named route or retained for a broad qualification.
requirementLegend.on-ramp: Foundation skill included so a novice can enter the core safely.
requirementLegend.enrichment: Useful extension, explicitly outside the guaranteed minimum.

schema.routeResolutionRule: A route's effective topic set is the union of its own route tag and every portable-core topic. sourceTags are evidence provenance and never determine route membership.

pathways.title: Medicine-facing bridge
pathways.description: Useful preparation for medical study, but not a universal entrant minimum.

pathways.title: US / MCAT
pathways.description: MCAT-aligned college-level science, behavioral science, and critical analysis.

pathways.title: UK direct entry
pathways.description: A-level and access-course preparation; institution rules vary.

pathways.description: National science curriculum coverage; admission weightings remain university-specific.

pathways.title: Continental direct entry
pathways.description: French, German, and related secondary-science depth.

pathways.title: Access / foundation
pathways.description: Novice on-ramp, scientific inquiry, laboratory practice, and foundational quantitative work.

pathways.title: Broad biological literacy
pathways.description: Evolution, ecology, and plant science beyond the medicine-specific minimum.

pathways.title: Advanced quantitative
pathways.description: Optional calculus and mathematical extensions not required by the MCAT.
